name: lakatotree-code-longinus-bindings
purpose: 엔진/서버 코드 심볼 ↔ KG ReferenceSite(Longinus) 의 in-repo 정본 미러. tests/test_longinus_bindings.py 가 매 커밋 drift 검사(KG 접속 불필요).
policy: symbol-resolved. anchor=sourceId(심볼). sha256=def-line 내용 해시(시그니처 변경 감지). line_hint=재유도 가능한 캐시(주석 추가 등으로 줄이 밀려도 무방 — 드리프트 아님). 진짜 drift = 심볼 소멸/리네임(L4) 또는 def-line 시그니처 변경(L6).

bindings.frege_sinn: compatibility facade delegating G-Web observation ingestion to the tree evidence claim service
compatibility facade delegating G-WorldAction ingestion to the tree evidence claim service
compatibility facade delegating gated-realm bypass protection to the tree evidence claim service
compatibility facade delegating gate-passed evidence append-only storage to the tree evidence claim service
compatibility facade delegating Neo4j constraint diagnostics to the tree programme service
compatibility facade delegating administrative verdict mutation to the tree judgement service
compatibility facade delegating preregistered prediction mutation to the tree judgement service
compatibility facade delegating scripted test-result judgement to the tree judgement service
oo positive verify — 실 도착 단언(poll)
ZDF 측정 dev→사전등록 공차 judge→정답 PASS/FAIL(B 해결)
파이프라인 verdict(oo) vs 정답 — 전체-ZDF drift 탐지
공차를 잠긴 Prediction 으로 사전등록=ground-truth contract
★ooptdd 로그 빌더 — pytest 결과→oo 구조화 trace(cid 묶음, ground truth)
ooptdd session-finish hook that ships and verifies collected pytest outcomes
ooptdd per-test report hook that collects setup/call/teardown outcomes
runtime configuration boundary; no import-time Neo4j requirement
Neo4j runtime adapter created lazily at port edge
FastAPI app factory used as composition root
vertical tree context service; explicit ports instead of app globals
tree context owns core HTTP routes while server.app remains compatibility facade
context-owned HTTP routes for evidence, arguments, standing, claim-standing, and certificates
application service owning evidence ingestion, standing, claim-standing, and certificate assembly
context-owned HTTP routes calling ProgrammeService directly (no intermediate Surface) for calibration, directions, stack, lifecycle, cycle, elements, foundation, and history
application service owning programme calibration, directions, cycles, foundation, history, and constraint diagnostics
context-owned HTTP routes for verdict, prediction, and scripted test result judgement
application service owning verdict, prediction, and scripted test-result judgement mutations
composition-root factory wiring lineage service ports while preserving monkeypatch-compatible load-lineage facade
lineage context derivation recording request schema
application service owning artifact lineage recording, replay checks, and export adapters
context-owned HTTP routes for artifact lineage, rebuild verification, and ecosystem exports
tree context parent edge request schema with inference and evidence metadata
tree context node mutation request schema
tree context frontier question request schema
tree context append-only research event schema with engine conversion
tree context G-Web observation schema with decomposed credibility inputs
tree context G-WorldAction execution evidence schema
tree context no-RCE programme cycle orchestration schema
tree context foundation requirement schema with engine conversion
required Neo4j uniqueness constraint descriptor for tree KG operations
reports missing tree KG constraints and emits IF NOT EXISTS migration Cypher
dry-run tree materialization estimate for rows, operations, transactions, and chunks
planner that predicts writer-compatible tree mutation chunks before KG writes
typed KG read boundary normalizing scalar/list/null property drift
fail-closed Lakatos write semantics before KG mutation
structured Lakatos policy finding carrying code, message, and enforcement severity
policy evaluation result that enforces strict mode while preserving warning mode findings
node validation output combining normalized parent edges with Lakatos policy findings
executable canonical frontier evidence hard-core and provenance rules for Lakatos tree writes
tree KG write result summary for chunked mutation accounting
chunked deterministic Cypher writer for Lakatos tree mutations
bulk tree mutation command carrying tree metadata, nodes, and frontier questions
validated mutation API coordinating semantic policy, KG writer, and history
사전등록·결정론 판결 — 텍스트로 progressive 못 산다
구조적 novel 명세 — 실측 대조 없으면 novel 불인정(F-CON-3)
P&R 4-way 변증법 — 반례 대응방식이 진보/퇴행 가름 (production)
단일 판결 권위 — metric+PnR+LakatosGate 합성, PnR degenerating이 metric-progressive 무효화
metric+질적 게이트 합의 (★감사: metric 비진보면 질적진단 단락=bug)
진보/퇴행 질적 게이트 (★감사: 라이벌없는 단일노드 종국 degenerating)
기반지식 gap 시 판결 보수적 차단
인터넷 관측의 조용한 KG claim 승격 차단

Dung grounded extension — CANONICAL standing(미해소 의문 없음)
정직성 감사 — 문헌값 vs 정책값 (가짜정밀 자가검출)
★감사HIGH: 판결 odds 곱셈이 조건독립 가정 미flagged — 같은판결 누적→인위확신
★orphan: 연속 SPRT 참조구현, production 폐기경로 미배선(grounding.py:200 자백)
★생성형 양의 휴리스틱 — 다음실험 생성 (현 /directions 진단; verdict spine 미연결=감사 P1)
음의 휴리스틱 — modus tollens→belt not hard core
★orphan: citation 그래프 TrustRank, 런타임 미배선(THEORY.md:78 자백)
hard_core 수축/확장 시 raise (음의 휴리스틱 형식화)
퇴행 깊이(연속 비진보 자식 체인 ≥3 경보)
지표 공유 트리구조(nodes/frontier/by/path/children/leaves/open_q/closed_q) 1급 객체 — 분해가 드러낸 shared-state 결합을 한 곳에
_TreeView 팩토리 — 부분 입력 허용(테스트/shim 호환), 오케스트레이터·shim 단일 생성 경로
CLI 표면 선언(서브커맨드+인자) — dispatch 와 분리한 단일 책임, parse-only 테스트 가능
CLI dispatch 오케스트레이터 — _build_parser 로 파싱 후 서버 API/로컬 감사 라우팅

kg_anchors_note: 코드 # KG: anchor 토큰의 선언 레지스트리(reverse-orphan 가드). 새 # KG: 노드 추가 시 여기 등록 필수 → KG 노드 생성 강제. live-KG 존재확인은 longinus.audit(online).
